## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential content marketing and SEO strategies for Argus Soft, an offshore development company looking to pivot and increase demand.](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Argus Soft is pivoting from general offshore development to specialized deployment teams for agentic workflows, with $10-20M annual revenue and 100+ engineers](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Company lacks content marketing and SEO strategy, relying primarily on sales-led approach](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers comprehensive content creation, SEO, and link-building services with a focus on becoming a "publisher" in the industry](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Potential collaboration would involve website redesign (possibly using Webflow) followed by aggressive content creation and link-building](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Current Challenges

  - [Argus Soft: $10-20M annual revenue, 100+ engineers, family-owned bootstrap company](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Pivoting from general offshore development to specialized deployment teams for agentic workflows](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Current utilization rate down to 40-50% due to decreased demand for engineers](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Lack of content marketing and SEO strategy, relying primarily on sales-led approach](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

### fwd.digital's Approach and Services

  - [Focus on becoming a "publisher" in the industry through regular, high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Services include content creation, programmatic SEO, and AI link building](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Custom-built tools and workflows for efficient content generation and management](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Human-in-the-loop approach with editors and fact-checking processes](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Typical timeline: First 3 months focus on indexing and initial impressions, with significant growth seen after 6-12 months](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

### Potential Collaboration Strategy

  - [Redesign Argus Soft website, possibly using Webflow for quick deployment](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Create a blog or resource section to host new content](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Aggressive content creation (e.g., 300 pages in 3 months for a similar client)](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Implement link-building strategies to improve domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Monitor performance through Google Search Console, focusing on impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)

### Pricing and Commitment

  - [fwd.digital's pricing is competitive when considering the full-service approach (content creation, strategy, tools, and ongoing management)](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [3-month pilot period followed by a 12-month commitment](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Current availability: Potential start dates of January 20th or February 3rd](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital to send sample Statement of Work (SOW) and meeting recording](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Avikrit to discuss with co-founder and potentially schedule a follow-up call](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
  - [Consider website redesign options, possibly using Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Evaluate timeline and budget for potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/QF4fSVc2_n2HsxG-2PQBzqHTdrYRscjv?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
